hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && node_modules/.bin/eslint "$f" 2>&1 || true; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; node_modules/.bin/prettier --check "$f" 2>&1 && true || echo "Prettier: formatting issue in $f — run npm run format to fix"; }

npm test > /tmp/bypasshire-test.txt 2>&1 && echo '{"continue": true}' || echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Tests are failing \u2014 fix them before ending the session.", "systemMessage": "Tests failed. Run npm test to see failures and fix before exiting."}'
